summary: Evidence array is empty: the cascading node-DOWN sequence, the 503/sD-- responses before nodes fell, the '<NOSRV>' all-backends-gone state, and the recovery are invisible despite the log carrying all of this explicitly.
improvements: Populate evidence with at least the first 'Server is DOWN' line and the 'backend has no server available' line — these are the clearest incident signals in the log
Include the 503 sD-- access lines as evidence context so the engineer sees client impact alongside the health-check failures
